name: Focus Flow
tagline: A calm, premium-feeling Pomodoro window for Anna.
description:
Focus Flow turns Anna into a deep-work companion. A minimal, designed timer window pairs a focus-session tool (Python stdio plugin) with a coaching skill, so you can start a Pomodoro from chat or from the window, get gentle reflections when you finish, and keep an honest log of what you actually focused on.

**What's inside**

- A premium single-window UI (glassmorphism, animated ring, dark/light themes).
- `acme.focus_session` — Executa stdio tool that persists timer state.
- `acme.focus_coach` — declarative SKILL.md that gives Anna the right tone.

**How to use**

Mention the Focus Flow app in any chat (`#focus-flow`), or open the window directly. Pick a duration, name what you'll work on, and start. Anna watches the timer through the tool — she will not interrupt while it's running.
_comment_bundled_executas: Executas that ship inside this app. `anna-app apps publish` publishes each one first, then substitutes its server-minted tool_id into every `bundled:<handle>` reference in manifest.json (in memory — the file on disk is never mutated) and writes bundle/anna-tool-ids.js so the UI bundle can read the same ids. No more hand-editing tool_id placeholders.
